articles.title: Legge to attempt Indy 500/Coke 600 double - RACER - Racing News
articles.description: Katherine Legge will become the first woman to try and contest both the Indianapolis 500 with HMD Motorsports/AJ Foyt Racing and the NASCAR Cup Series' Coca-Cola 600 at Charlotte with Live Fast Motorsports.
articles.content: Katherine Legge will become the first woman to try and complete 1,100 miles of racing on the same day later this month as the Briton is set to contest the Indianapolis 500 with HMD Motorsports/AJ Foy… [+1041 chars]
